tasks.title: Enforce schemas, configuration, paths, security and release integrity
tasks.goal: Close the P0 and P1 findings from the post-merge trust-gate audit.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Close AgentOS post-merge audit findings with executable contracts and verified CI.
agentGoal.outcome: Invalid schemas, YAML, paths and secret assignments fail closed, with accurate release evidence.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm audit, npm run validate, npm test, GitHub Actions and branch protection
constraints: Do not add medium or long-term product functionality.
Do not execute a real deployment.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Implement each correction from a failing regression test and preserve existing semantic validators.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three identical blockers or an unavailable external GitHub capability.

acceptanceCriteria: JSON Schemas reject invalid scalar, nested and additional fields.
AgentOS YAML rejects policy type bypasses and malformed semantic sections.
Closed paths reject forbidden symlink aliases, repository root edits and foreign absolute syntax.
Secret scanning detects prefixed assignment names.
CI, dependency policy and release documentation match the verified state.
